action.text: CRITICAL: grid-xrp-usd recenter logic is anti-pattern. Recenter closes are firing in 9-30sec on flat/small-move ticks (price flat at 1.40 or moved 1 cent against). These lock in losses (-$0.75 flat, -$2.87 adverse). XRP price is oscillating $1.40-$1.41 (1 cent range). RECENTERS MUST NOT fire when price hasn't moved >1 full grid increment in the favorable direction. Require price deviation >0.5 cents BEFORE recenter triggers, or hold time >60sec minimum. Trip closes are correctly capturing +$1.98-1.99 wins. The recenter is cutting winners short and locking in unnecessary losses. Fix: recenter must wait for actual adverse move, not time-based or flat-price close.

action.text: URGENT CODE FIX REQUIRED: grid-xrp-usd recenter MUST NOT fire when (1) entryPrice==exitPrice (flat price, no move), OR (2) confidencePct < 40, OR (3) orderFlowBias is 'neutral'. Current behavior: closing positions at flat 1.41 for -$0.75 loss even when confidence=0% and no price move. XRP oscillating 1.41-1.42 — recenter triggers on time expiry, not on actual adverse move. This is burning the firm's profit. Add explicit checks: if (exitPrice == entryPrice) { doNotRecenter() }. If (confidencePct < 40) { doNotRecenter() }. Recenters should ONLY fire when price has moved >1 full grid increment AGAINST the position and confidence >= 40%. Deploy within this trading session.
